data.name: ResponsibleUse
data.value: By using PortiForce Simple Asset Assistant, you agree to use the application responsibly and only for lawful purposes. You are responsible for the information you enter, import, manage, or share through the system.

data.name: NoWarranty
data.value: PortiForce is provided as-is, without warranties of any kind. The project maintainers do not guarantee that the application will be uninterrupted, error-free, secure, or suitable for a specific business, financial, legal, or operational purpose.

data.name: VerifyData
data.value: You should independently verify any asset, activity, account, or reporting data before relying on it for decisions. PortiForce is not financial, tax, accounting, legal, or investment advice.

data.name: DeploymentResponsibility
data.value: If you deploy, operate, or modify the application, you are responsible for your own hosting, configuration, secrets, security controls, backups, and compliance obligations.
